description_long: This is a young adult male figure dressed in smart-casual attire, featuring a collared shirt with a contrasting placket and a dark sweater layered over it. He wears fitted trousers secured with a belt and matching shoes, presenting a neat and modern urban appearance. His sleeves are rolled up to the elbows, suggesting a relaxed yet purposeful demeanor. The figure's hair is styled in a short, side-parted cut, and his facial features are clean-shaven and youthful. The overall build is average, with a natural, upright posture and arms slightly extended at his sides. No accessories or carried items are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a streamlined silhouette.
description: A young adult male in smart-casual attire with a collared shirt, sweater, fitted trousers, and short styled hair, standing upright with arms slightly out.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, sweater, belt, and facial features with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the rolled-up sleeve, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the sweater, trousers, and hair, with arms and hands visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt with sweater, fitted trousers, and belt
